summary: PHASE 13.7 Alpha Deployment module testing completed successfully. All 9 key API endpoints tested and working correctly with expected deployment state (5 active, 18 shadow, 23 total factors).

external_routing_issues.issue: External routing through Kubernetes ingress not configured for alpha-deployment prefix
external_routing_issues.impact: Endpoints work locally but return 404 when accessed via external URL
external_routing_issues.workaround: APIs are fully functional when accessed locally (localhost:8001)

passed_tests: ✅ Signal summary for BTCUSDT (7 active signals)
action_item_for_main_agent: Configure Kubernetes ingress routing to include /api/alpha-deployment/* prefix so that Alpha Deployment endpoints are accessible via external URL. Currently endpoints work perfectly when accessed locally but return 404 via external URL.
